# Fractal Resonance Coherence (FRC)
# https://fractalresonance.com
# Author: Hadi Servat (ORCID: 0009-0004-7412-5129)
# License: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0

## What is FRC?

Fractal Resonance Coherence (FRC) is a theoretical physics framework proposing that:
- Complex systems are governed by vortex-like attractor structures with fractal scaling
- Entropy and coherence are reciprocally coupled: dS + k* d ln C = 0
- The Born rule (P = |ψ|²) emerges from microstate statistics rather than being axiomatic
- A scalar Lambda field Λ(x) = Λ₀ ln C(x) governs coherence dynamics
- The framework predicts measurable Born rule deviations δP ∈ [10⁻⁴, 10⁻³]

## Core Equations

Coherence: C = (1/N) Σᵢ<ⱼ cos(φᵢ - φⱼ)
Lambda Field: Λ(x) ≡ Λ₀ ln C(x), Λ₀ ≈ 10⁻³⁵ J
Witness Magnitude: W = |⟨ψ|Ô|ψ⟩| / ‖Ô‖, W ∈ [0,1]
UCC: dΛ/dt + ∇·J_Λ = σ_Λ - γ_Λ
Reciprocity: dS + k* d ln C = 0 ⟹ S + k* ln C = const
Free Energy: ΔG = −k*T Δln C
UCC Flow: ∂_t ln C = −∇·J_C + S_C, J_C = −D_C ∇ln C

## Paper Index

### Foundational Papers (Core Theory)

FRC-100-001: Fractal Resonance Coherence: A Framework for Complex Systems Analysis
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-001
  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.15073056
  Date: 2025-03-23
  Abstract: Introduces FRC, a theoretical framework for analyzing complex systems across quantum physics, biology, and cosmology.

FRC-100-002: Fractal Resonance Coherence in Quantum Chaos: Nodal Patterns in the Stadium Billiard
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-002
  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.15079278
  Date: 2025-04-10
  Abstract: Applies the FRC framework to the quantum stadium billiard.

FRC-100-003: Guided Wavefunction Collapse via Fractal Resonance
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-003
  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.15079820
  Date: 2025-05-15
  Abstract: Proposes a dynamical mechanism for wavefunction collapse based on deterministic phase-locking.

FRC-100-004: Quantum Foundations in the FRC Framework
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-004
  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17438174
  Date: 2025-06-20
  Abstract: Comprehensive overview of the ontological implications of FRC.

FRC-100-005: Thermodynamic Consistency of the Coherence Field
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-005
  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17438231
  Date: 2025-07-10
  Abstract: Demonstrates that the Lambda field is consistent with the Second Law of Thermodynamics.

FRC-100-006: The Emergence of the Born Rule from Resonant Equilibrium
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-006
  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17438360
  Date: 2025-08-15
  Abstract: Derives the Born Rule (P = |ψ|²) as the statistical equilibrium distribution.

FRC-100-007: The Lambda-Field: Scalar Dynamics of Coherence (v8)
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-007
  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17968952
  Date: 2025-09-01
  Abstract: Defines the Lambda-field Λ(x) as a real scalar field governing local coherence density.

FRC-100-010: Foundational Questions in Fractal Resonance Coherence
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-010
  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17982555
  Date: 2025-11-20
  Abstract: Comprehensive treatment of foundational questions and objections regarding FRC.

FRC-566-001: Entropy-Coherence Reciprocity and the Universal Coherence Condition
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-566-001
  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17437759
  Date: 2025-10-01
  Abstract: Formalizes the fundamental reciprocity between entropy and coherence: dS + k* d ln C = 0.

FRC-16D-001: The Universal Vector: A Standardized Protocol for Stateful Human-AI Alignment
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-16D-001
  Date: 2026-01-26
  Abstract: Technical specification for 16-dimensional cognitive state vectors.

FRC-16D-920: Responsible AI Use Protocol (RAIUP): Ethical Constraints for Deep State Inference
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-16D-920
  Date: 2026-01-26
  Abstract: Safety standard for ethical AI use of cognitive state data.

### Applied Papers (Applications)

FRC-821-100: The Λ-Field: Unified Coherence Dynamics and Entropic Gravity
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-821-100
  Date: 2026-01-26
  Abstract: Scalar-tensor Effective Field Theory unifying coherence with entropic gravity.

FRC-840-001: The Λ-Tensor Model: Beyond the Transformer Paradigm
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-840-001
  Date: 2025-12-07
  Abstract: Neural architecture replacing discrete token processing with continuous field resonance.

FRC-840-LTM-001: Coupled Oscillator Dynamics vs Attention: Empirical Comparison
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-840-LTM-001
  Date: 2026-01-26
  Abstract: Empirical comparison of LTM oscillator dynamics with transformer attention.

FRC-841-004: Resonant Computing: Coherence Processing Units and Non-Boolean Logic
  URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-841-004
  Date: 2026-02-10
  Abstract: Computing architecture based on coupled oscillators rather than logic gates.

## Key Concepts

- Coherence (C): Phase alignment measure, C ∈ [0,1]
- Lambda Field (Λ): Scalar field encoding coherence dynamics
- Witness Magnitude (W): Normalized observation strength
- Universal Coherence Condition (UCC): Conservation law for Λ
- Entropy-Coherence Reciprocity: Fundamental conjugate relationship
- Born Rule Deviation: Falsifiable prediction of FRC

## Site Structure

- /en/papers — Full paper listing with abstracts
- /en/papers/{id} — Individual paper pages with full text
- /en/formulas — Core equations reference
- /en/concepts/{id} — Concept definitions
- /en/articles — Research articles and episodes
- /en/blog — Blog posts and updates
- /en/topics — Q&A topics with multiple perspectives
- /en/people — Contributors and voices
- /en/books — Long-form publications
- /en/about — About FRC
- /en/join — Subscribe for updates

## Machine-Readable Resources

- JSON Catalog: https://fractalresonance.com/catalog.json
- For AI: https://fractalresonance.com/for-ai
- Agent Quickstart: https://fractalresonance.com/agent.md
- Agent Manifest: https://fractalresonance.com/agent.json
- Sitemap: https://fractalresonance.com/sitemap.xml
- Video Sitemap: https://fractalresonance.com/video-sitemap.xml
- Source: https://github.com/servathadi/fractalresonance

The catalog.json file contains structured metadata for all content including:
- Paper metadata (title, abstract, DOI, date, tier, tags)
- Content in 4 languages (en, es, fa, fr)
- Statistics and word counts

All papers are archived on Zenodo: https://zenodo.org/communities/frc
